typeProperties.script:
source(output(
		{Activity ID} as string,
		{Activity Name} as string,
		{Resource ID Name} as string,
		{GLOBAL - EXECUTED BY TYPE} as string,
		Start as string,
		Finish as string,
		{Spreadsheet Field} as string,
		period as string,
		units as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: false,
	purgeFiles: true,
	rowUrlColumn: 'FileName',
	wildcardPaths:['Project_Data/NCSA/P6/Labor_Units/p6_labor_stage.csv']) ~> srcLaborUnitsStage
srcLaborUnitsStage derive(FileName = concat('Project_Data/NCSA/P6/Labor_Units/',substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),1,4),'/',substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),6,2),'/',substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),9,2),'/','p6_labor_',replace(replace(toString(currentTimestamp()),'.',''),':',''),'.csv')) ~> setFileName
setFileName sink(allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	rowUrlColumn:'FileName',
	umask: 0022,
	preCommands: [],
	postCommands: [],
	skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true,
	mapColumn(
		{Activity ID},
		{Activity Name},
		{Resource ID Name},
		{GLOBAL - EXECUTED BY TYPE},
		Start,
		Finish,
		{Spreadsheet Field},
		period,
		units,
		FileName
	)) ~> snkROCSiteproRaw
